question: What is the fee structure for B.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: B.Tech fee is semester-wise: 1st Sem: Institute Fee 37980, 2nd Sem: 31035, 3rd Sem: 32280, 4th Sem: 31035, 5th Sem: 32280, 6th Sem: 31035, 7th Sem: 32280, 8th Sem: 31535. Mess Fee: 16000 per semester. Hostel Fee: 1980 to 2480 depending on semester.

question: What is the fee structure for M.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech fee is semester-wise: 1st Sem: Institute Fee 43480, 2nd Sem: 36535, 3rd Sem: 37780, 4th Sem: 36835. Mess Fee: 16000 per semester. Hostel Fee: 1980 to 2480 depending on semester.

question: How to pay college fees at GBPIET?
answer: College fees can be paid online via SBI Collect: https://onlinesbi.sbi.bank.in/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=823332. Hostel and mess fees: https://onlinesbi.sbi.bank.in/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=908435.
